title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery tutorial showing how to build a Duolingo clone in React Native using "Practical Vibe Coding," a workflow that leverages AI to accelerate app development from months to a weekend. The tutorial covers integration of Clerk for auth, PostHog for analytics, Vision Agents for image analysis, and Stream for real-time communication.
